title: Expressive Pastel
description: Ce style imite les dessins expressifs au crayon de couleur ou au pastel gras sur un papier à forte texture. Il s'appuie sur des hachures directionnelles énergiques et non estompées pour construire les formes et les volumes sans utiliser de contours stricts, créant une esthétique illustrative lumineuse et très tactile.
description_en: This style mimics expressive colored pencil or wax pastel drawings on heavily textured cold-pressed paper. It relies on energetic, unblended directional hatching and scumbling to build form and volume without the use of hard outlines, creating a luminous and highly tactile illustrative aesthetic.
description_fr: Ce style imite les dessins expressifs au crayon de couleur ou au pastel gras sur un papier à forte texture. Il s'appuie sur des hachures directionnelles énergiques et non estompées pour construire les formes et les volumes sans utiliser de contours stricts, créant une esthétique illustrative lumineuse et très tactile.
prompt: An expressive colored pencil and wax pastel drawing on heavy, cold-pressed textured watercolor paper. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The artwork is created entirely through energetic, unblended directional hatching and scumbling techniques. Forms and volumes are constructed using clusters of distinct, thick pastel strokes rather than hard outlines or continuous smooth shading. The visible tooth of the paper breaks up the strokes, allowing the underlying lightness to shine through and creating a luminous, airy, and highly tactile aesthetic. The color palette features vibrant, high-chroma hues, utilizing {{primary_color}} as the dominant base, complemented by energetic strokes of {{secondary_color}} to build depth, and striking highlights of {{accent_color}} to draw the eye. Lighting is bright and illustrative, lacking harsh realistic shadows but using concentrated dark strokes to ground elements and define spatial relationships. The perspective is slightly flattened, evoking a charming, naive, and contemporary editorial illustration style. Edges of objects are ragged and organic, formed naturally by the termination of the hatched lines rather than crisp vector boundaries. The strokes follow the organic flow of the shapes they describe, creating a rhythmic and dynamic sense of movement across the composition. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners.
prompt_removebg: An expressive colored pencil and wax pastel drawing composited on a clean {{background_color}} surface. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The artwork is created entirely through energetic, unblended directional hatching and scumbling techniques. Forms and volumes are constructed using clusters of distinct, thick pastel strokes rather than hard outlines or continuous smooth shading. The visible tooth of the simulated paper breaks up the strokes, creating a luminous, airy, and highly tactile aesthetic against the flat {{background_color}} backdrop. The color palette features vibrant, high-chroma hues, utilizing {{primary_color}} as the dominant base, complemented by energetic strokes of {{secondary_color}} to build depth, and striking highlights of {{accent_color}} to draw the eye. Lighting is bright and illustrative, lacking harsh realistic shadows but using concentrated dark strokes to ground elements and define spatial relationships. The perspective is slightly flattened, evoking a charming, naive, and contemporary editorial illustration style. Edges of objects are ragged and organic, formed naturally by the termination of the hatched lines, explicitly allowing intentional overflow where parts of the {{subject}} can extend beyond the visible frame (cropped by the image boundaries) and interact dynamically with the {{background_color}}. The strokes follow the organic flow of the shapes they describe, creating a rhythmic and dynamic sense of movement.
background_prompt: A pure, empty landscape environment rendered in an expressive colored pencil and wax pastel style on heavy textured paper. The scene features sweeping, unblended directional hatching and scumbling, building atmospheric depth through clusters of vibrant strokes. The dominant {{primary_color}} establishes the terrain and atmospheric elements, while {{secondary_color}} adds rhythmic shadows and spatial layering. Bright {{accent_color}} highlights suggest dappled, vibrant daylight. The visible paper tooth creates a luminous, airy texture throughout the entire composition, with no foreground subjects, no borders, and no frames.
background_prompt_removebg: A pure, empty landscape environment rendered in an expressive colored pencil and wax pastel style, featuring sweeping, unblended directional hatching and scumbling that builds atmospheric depth through clusters of vibrant strokes. The dominant {{primary_color}} establishes the terrain, while {{secondary_color}} adds rhythmic spatial layering, and {{accent_color}} highlights suggest dappled daylight. This scene is framed by a decorative foreground overlay of ragged, organic pastel hatch-marks that create a textured vignette effect. Both the atmospheric environment and the expressive hatched frame transition smoothly into the flat {{background_color}} surface, allowing the distinct paper-tooth texture of the strokes to fade out beautifully against the solid backdrop.
